content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "NEUTRAL",
    "reasoning": "Book is 79% deployed with 10 existing positions, right at the 80% cap. Mixed P&L across holdings with PNBHOUSING and TORNTPOWER showing strength while MAHABANK lags. Key binary event risk: ADANIPOWER Q4 results April 29, AUBANK Q4 April 27, HUL Q4 April 28, GRANULES Q4 April 29 — heavy earnings cluster in the next week. Focus must be on setting stop-losses on existing positions (currently all at 0.00) rather than chasing new entries.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24000,
      "nifty_resistance": 24400
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 74.00,
      "new_target": 88.00,
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Thesis intact — PSU bank sector strongly outperforming (+15% in April), Q4 results positive, stock recently hit 52W high. Current dip to 78.49 is within normal pullback range. Setting SL at 74 (~5.7% below entry, below SMA20 of 67 but above recent consolidation range). Target 88 represents continuation to fresh highs. RR ~1.4:1 which is marginal but thesis is strong."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 955.00,
      "new_target": 1080.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Strong earnings catalyst — record FY26 PAT +20%, GNPA 0.93%, stock +10.57% today. Position is up 2.1%. Trail SL to 955 (below today's gap low of 981 with buffer, still ~3% below entry). Target 1080 approaching 52W high of 1141. RR ~2.6:1 from CMP. Best-positioned holding currently."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 120.50,
      "new_target": 132.00,
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "reasoning": "Defensive hedge position. Gold softening post-Akshaya Tritiya and US-Iran ceasefire extension reduces safe-haven bid. Keep as portfolio hedge but set SL at 120.50 (~3.7% below entry, below SMA20 121.92). Target 132 for measured recovery toward SMA50. Low conviction but serves diversification role."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "TORNTPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1620.00,
      "new_target": 1820.00,
      "confidence": 0.68,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 12,
      "reasoning": "Up 2.9%, stock above 52W high of 1640, Nabha Power acquisition catalyst, sector tailwind from summer demand. Trail SL to 1620 (below prior breakout level, protects entry). Target 1820 conservative vs analyst TP 2000-2300. RR ~1.5:1. Q4 results ~May 13 is an event buffer."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1355.00,
      "new_target": 1500.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Blockbuster Q4 already printed (PAT +27%, rev +22.6%), stock at fresh 52W high. Position slightly underwater on entry but thesis massively validated. SL 1355 (~4% below entry, above SMA9 and below today's low). Target 1500 aligns with ICICI Sec TP 1650 conservatively. Rich valuation limits upside — keep defined risk."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "AUBANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1005.00,
      "new_target": 1120.00,
      "confidence": 0.68,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 7,
      "reasoning": "Q4 business update strong (deposits +22.8%, advances +25.1%), results April 27 catalyst. Stock broke above 1040 resistance today. SL 1005 (~4% below entry, below 52W high of 1039 old resistance now support). Target 1120 allows for post-result upside. Hold days capped at 7 to exit post-earnings event."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "GRANULES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 645.00,
      "new_target": 740.00,
      "confidence": 0.58,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 6,
      "reasoning": "Position flat. 3.7x volume surge today, FDA Chantilly inspection closed with procedural 483s (positive), Q4 results April 29. SL at 645 (~5.3% below entry, below SMA9 646, above recent support 630). Target 740 pre-results. Gagillapur Warning Letter overhang caps conviction. Exit ahead of April 29 earnings if target not hit."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 2275.00,
      "new_target": 2500.00,
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 6,
      "reasoning": "Q4 results April 28 — 5 days away. Nestle's strong print raises the bar. Urban consumption slowdown is a risk to HUL's skew. SL 2275 (~4% below entry, below SMA9). Target 2500 based on sell-side range. Keep position tight and plan exit around earnings."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 388.00,
      "new_target": 425.00,
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "reasoning": "Defensive power play — regulated returns, dividend yield, capacity additions (89,528 MW), Q4 results May 15. Stock consolidating near 52W high. SL 388 (~4% below entry, at SMA9). Target 425 for breakout continuation. Cheap vs peers at P/E 14.88."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ADANIPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 202.00,
      "new_target": 232.00,
      "confidence": 0.58,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 6,
      "reasoning": "Up 44% in April, Q4 results April 29 is major event risk. Shooting star pattern April 20 suggests exhaustion. SL 202 (~5.6% below entry, below today's low 212 — wider buffer given volatility). Target 232 modest given extended move. Exit mandatory before April 29 earnings. Position is smallest of book (~5%)."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 74.00,
      "reasoning": "PSU bank strength + Q4 beat supports holding through pullback. Set SL below recent consolidation."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 955.00,
      "reasoning": "Strongest position. Trail SL below today's gap-up low to protect gains while allowing continuation."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 120.50,
      "reasoning": "Defensive hedge, geopolitical premium fading. Tight SL in case weakness continues."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "TORNTPOWER",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1620.00,
      "reasoning": "Above 52W high with sector tailwind. Lock in profits by trailing SL to near-breakeven."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1355.00,
      "reasoning": "Post-results positioning, let momentum play out with defined SL below recent support."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "AUBANK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1005.00,
      "reasoning": "Hold into April 27 results with SL protecting downside."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GRANULES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 645.00,
      "reasoning": "Flat position, monitoring for pre-earnings move. Exit before April 29 if target not hit."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 2275.00,
      "reasoning": "April 28 earnings is key catalyst. SL protects against disappointment vs Nestle benchmark."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 388.00,
      "reasoning": "Defensive power hold, wait for breakout or May 15 results."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ADANIPOWER",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 202.00,
      "reasoning": "Extended run, shooting star pattern, Q4 results April 29. Wider SL due to volatility but must exit before earnings."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "TRITURBINE, BHEL, ELECON, DEEPAKNTR, PIRAMALFIN, AUROPHARMA — all extended post-rally, no clean RR setups today. Will revisit on pullbacks. CESC shows the best volume/price divergence but book is fully deployed. Heavy earnings cluster April 27-29 for multiple holdings — this is a week to manage risk, not add.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is 79% deployed (right at the 80% cap) — no new entries possible without trimming. All 10 positions now have defined SLs and targets (previously 0.00 across the board, which was a system gap). Key risk: correlated-theme clusters — Power (TORNTPOWER, NTPC, ADANIPOWER = ~18% of book) and Financials (MAHABANK, PNBHOUSING, AUBANK = ~25%+ of book) are right at the 20% cluster soft-cap and 35% sector hard-cap. FMCG cluster (NESTLEIND, HINDUNILVR) adds defensive balance. Next cycle priority: if PNBHOUSING or TORNTPOWER hit targets, free up cash; if ADANIPOWER weakens into April 29 earnings, exit early rather than ride the event. No new entries this session."
}
